seo.title: Pilates Studio Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your Pilates studio. Route unhappy clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Pilates Studios

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Pilates Studio Faces

items.heading: Progress is slow and private

items.heading: Instructors vary in how they close class

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Pilates Studios

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Consistent ask after checkout
items.body: Same link no matter who taught.
